description: A strategic document outlining the approach to demonstrate the technical viability of platform-neutral and fallback-capable authentication methods, including objectives, success metrics, and strategic choices.
steps_to_create: Define objectives for technical demonstrators.
Identify key success metrics for demonstrators.
Outline strategic choices and trade-offs.
Draft the document and circulate for feedback.

description: A framework for framing and messaging to influence key stakeholders, focusing on resilience, continuity, and supplier concentration while addressing privacy and democratic accountability.
steps_to_create: Identify key stakeholders and their interests.
Draft messaging strategies and framing.
Outline advocacy objectives and success metrics.
Review and finalize the document.

description: A strategic plan to define the scope and composition of the project's support base, focusing on stakeholder engagement and coalition strength.
steps_to_create: Identify potential coalition members and stakeholders.
Outline engagement strategies and objectives.
Draft the coalition building strategy document.
Circulate for feedback and finalize.
approval_authorities: Project Manager, Policy & Public Affairs Coordinator

description: A document outlining the approach to shape procurement documents to include platform neutrality and fallback access requirements, detailing strategic choices and potential risks.
steps_to_create: Define procurement objectives and requirements.
Identify strategic choices and potential trade-offs.
Draft the procurement influence strategy document.
Review with stakeholders and finalize.

description: A strategic framework for influencing European Digital Identity Wallet standards, focusing on platform-neutral access and certified fallback mechanisms.
steps_to_create: Identify relevant EU bodies and standards.
Outline engagement strategies and objectives.
Draft the EU standards engagement strategy document.
Circulate for feedback and finalize.

document_name: Current State Assessment of Digital Identity Infrastructure
description: A baseline assessment report detailing the current state of Denmark's digital identity infrastructure, including existing systems, regulations, and stakeholder landscape.
steps_to_create: Gather existing data and documentation on digital identity infrastructure.
Analyze current systems and regulations.
Draft the current state assessment report.
Review and finalize the document.
